description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style design with a matte black finish and a wooden upper handguard. The body is constructed primarily from metal, with a robust, angular form and integrated Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger and grip are positioned forward, with a thumbhole-style stock that merges seamlessly into the rear section. The barrel is short and recessed, with no visible muzzle device. The magazine is not externally visible, suggesting an internal or rear-loading configuration. The overall appearance is modern and tactical, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a wooden upper handguard and integrated top rail, featuring a modern, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden handguard, thumbhole stock, and top rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel opening and the alignment of the handguard and rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the grip and trigger more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's shape and the top rail's alignment, with the barrel barely visible.
